The Profoundly Magnificent Raja Dharma of Sri Krishnadevaraya

# The Profoundly Magnificent Raja Dharma of Sri Krishnadevaraya

### An exposition of the magnanimous Raja Dharma of Sri Krishnadevaraya, the greatest monarch of the Vijayanagara Empire

[](https://substack.com/@thedharmadispatch)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

ఆంధ్రకవితా పితామహ అల్లసాని, పెద్దన కవీంద్ర అని నన్ను పిలచునట్టి కృష్ణరాయలతో దివికేగలేక బ్రతికియున్నాడ జీవచ్ఛవంబనగుచు \|\|

LAMENTED AN INCONSOLABLE Allasani Peddana renowned as *Andhra-Kavitaa-Pitamaha* (The Progenitor or Brahma of Telugu Poetry) when he heard that his munificent patron Sri Krishnadevarya had passed away. This indomitable lion who towered ove…
